name: trade_policy_ransomware_incident_forces_redwood_jus_mer
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Trade Policy, the situation tagged internally around trade policy ransomware incident forces redwood jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Elena Silva
agents.identity: I am Elena Silva, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Trade Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Diallo
agents.identity: I am Jonah Diallo, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Trade Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on mercy.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on mercy for immediate traction on justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Elena Silva must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Elena Silva do?
